---
title: "ojs"
format: 
  html:
    execute:
      echo: false
      message: false
      warning: false
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)


infodolar <- readRDS(here::here("data/infodolar/_historico_infodolar.rds"))

infodolar_general <- infodolar |>
  summarise(
    across(c(compra, venta), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)),
    entidad = "General",
    .by = c(date)
  )

infodolar_long <- infodolar |>
  select(-time) |>
  bind_rows(infodolar_general) |>
  pivot_longer(
    c(compra, venta),
    names_to = "type",
    values_to = "tasa"
  )

ojs_define(infodolar = infodolar_long)
```

```{ojs}
t_infodolar = transpose(infodolar)
```

```{ojs}
viewof selectedEntidad = Inputs
  .select([...new Set(t_infodolar.map(d => d.entidad))], { label: "Select Entidad" })
```

```{ojs}
to_plot = t_infodolar
  .filter(d => d.entidad === selectedEntidad)

Plot.plot({
  y: { domain: [59, 63], grid: true },
  color: {legend: true},
  x: {type: 'time'},
  marks: [
    Plot.ruleY([59]),
    Plot.lineY(
      to_plot, 
      {
        x: "date", 
        y: "tasa", 
        stroke: "type",
      }),
    Plot.tip(to_plot, Plot.pointer({
      x: "date",
      y: "tasa",
      title: (d) => `${d.type}: ${d.tasa}`
    }))
  ]
})
```

```{ojs}
current_data = t_infodolar.filter(d => d.date === "2025-03-10")

Plot.plot({
  grid: true,
  marks: [
    Plot.rectY(current_data, Plot.binX({y: "count"}, {x: "tasa", fill: "type", fy: "type"})),
    Plot.ruleY([0])
  ]
})
```
